summary:
# 每日彙整報告

## 📰 今日重點摘要
1. 特朗普政策影響加密隱私開發者，Coin Center表達擔憂。
2. 比特幣在供應利潤指標下降至50%時上漲655%。
3. XRP跌至兩週低點，Ripple部署AI增強帳本安全性。
4. 日本金融監管機構對KuCoin的場外衍生品交易提出警告。
5. 恐懼貪婪指數顯示極度恐懼，市場情緒低迷。

## 📊 市場概況
今日整體市場氛圍偏向悲觀，主要加密貨幣普遍下滑。比特幣（BTC）目前價格為$68,898，24小時內下跌約2.96%。以太坊（ETH）和Solana（SOL）也出現下跌，分別為4.39%和5.02%。儘管如此，比特幣市佔率仍高達56.44%，顯示其在市場中的主導地位不變。全市場總市值為$2.44T，顯示出整體市場活躍度下降。

## 🔍 技術分析解讀
從技術指標來看，比特幣的相對強弱指數（RSI）為50.31，顯示出市場處於中性狀態，但均線訊號指向空頭，暗示短期內可能會有進一步下跌的壓力。以太坊的RSI為50.68，顯示出輕微的多頭信號，雖然價格有所波動，但仍有一定的支撐力量。其他幣種如BNB和XRP的RSI均低於50，顯示出空頭趨勢，短期內需謹慎看待。

## 😱 市場情緒
目前恐懼貪婪指數為10，顯示出市場處於極度恐懼狀態，這通常會影響投資者的決策，可能導致進一步的拋售壓力。社群情緒普遍低迷，投資者對未來市場走勢感到不安，關注加密政策及市場動向的回應。

## ⚠️ 風險提醒
當前市場環境中，風險因素依然存在。特朗普政策的變化及地緣政治的影響可能會持續對加密市場造成波動。同時，市場情緒的極度恐懼可能導致投資者盲目賣出，未來價格反彈的空間受到限制。建議投資者謹慎操作，避免因情緒波動而做出不理性的決策。

## 🎯 今日觀察重點
1. 觀察特朗普政策對市場的持續影響及其對加密隱私開發者的衝擊。
2. 留意比特幣和以太坊的價格走勢，特別是RSI指標的變化情況。
3. 監控日本對KuCoin的警告及其可能對市場的潛在影響。
4. 關注市場情緒指數的變化，尋找投資機會或風險信號。

news.title: Trump Policy Has Crypto Privacy Developers in a 'Very Bad State', Says Coin Center
news.summary: The Trump DOJ has said it won't prosecute crypto software developers. But it's doing so anyway, and getting "binding legal clarity" is a major concern, says Coin Center's executive director.

news.summary_zh: Coin Center指出，特朗普的政策對加密隱私開發者造成了嚴重影響，導致其處境艱難。

news.title: CZ-owned Trust Wallet launches AI agents that can execute crypto trades
news.summary: The Trust Wallet Agent Kit infrastructure lets AI agents execute real crypto transactions across more than 25 blockchains.

news.title: Stablecoin rewards restrictions can slow but not stop Circle's USDC, says Citigroup

news.summary_zh: 花旗集團指出，儘管面臨獎勵限制，Circle的USDC仍將持續運作。

news.title: USDT0 expands to payments-focused blockchain Tempo
news.summary: USDT0 tokens are minted using LayerZero's Omnichain Fungible Token standard and maintain a 1:1 backing with USDT.

news.title: UK sanctions crypto-linked marketplace Xinbi amid crackdown on Southeast Asia scam centres
news.summary: Officials said the measures aim to target the financial infrastructure behind scams, including platforms used to sell stolen data.

news.summary_zh: 英國政府對Xinbi市場實施制裁，以加強對東南亞詐騙活動的打擊。

news.title: MARA sells $1.1B in Bitcoin to buy back debt at 9% discount
news.summary: MARA Holdings sold 15,133 Bitcoin for roughly $1.1 billion in March to buy back $1 billion of zero-coupon convertible notes at a discount, reducing its convertible debt

news.summary_zh: MARA公司出售11億美元的比特幣，以9%的折扣回購其債務，顯示出其財務策略的調整。

news.title: DeFi lender Moonwell faces governance attack as $1,800 vote push threatens $1 million in funds
news.summary: Moonwell is facing a governance attack after a $1,800 token purchase was used to push a proposal that could drain over $1 million.

news.summary_zh: Moonwell遭遇治理攻擊，1800美元的投票推動可能影響到100萬美元的資金安全。

news.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index falls 3.2% as all constituents trade lower

news.summary_zh: CoinDesk 20指數下跌3.2%，顯示出加密市場整體疲弱的交易情況。

news.title: MARA sells 15,133 bitcoin for $1.1 billion to fund convertible note repurchase
news.summary: MARA sold 15,133 bitcoin for $1.1 billion to repurchase $1 billion in convertible notes, cutting debt 30%.

news.title: Bhutan Moves $37M in Bitcoin to Exchanges, Holdings Down Two-Thirds From Peak
news.summary: With its latest transfer of Bitcoin to exchanges, Bhutan has reduced its sovereign holdings to 4,453 BTC from nearly 13,000 BTC in late 2024.
news.title_zh: 不丹將3700萬美元比特幣轉移至交易所，持有量較高峰下降三分之二

news.title: White House clears review of proposal to allow crypto in 401(k) retirement plans

news.title: How a seed phrase leak led to a $176M Bitcoin theft case

news.title: Bitcoin miners face breakeven pressure as AI pivot accelerates, CoinShares says
